response.name: Booking documents
response.body:
{
  "key": "BookingDocuments",
  "content": [
    {

        "PSPT"

    {

      "issueCountryRequired": false
    },
    {
      "orderNumber": "3",
      "docType": "F",

      "nameEN": "National ID Card",
      "issueCountryRequired": false,
      "relatedDocuments": [
        "BRGN",
        "DRLS",
        "NTID"
      ]
    },
    {
      "orderNumber": "4",

    {
      "orderNumber": "5",

    {

    {

      "namePT": "Certificado de Naturalização Americana",
      "nameES": "Certificado de Naturalización de EE. UU.",

    },
    {
      "orderNumber": "8",
      "docType": "F",
      "namePT": "Certidão de Nascimento",
